title: Lack of School Drinking Water and Toilet
description: The school has no functional drinking water filter, and the boys/girls toilets are broken and locked. Girls are missing school days due to lack of sanitation facilities.
descriptionTranslated: [Translated from Telugu]: The school has no functional drinking water filter, and the boys/girls toilets are broken and locked. Girls are missing school days due to lack of sanitation facilities.

title: Dry Borewells and Inoperative Handpumps
description: Due to the falling water table, all three handpumps in the village have dried up. We require either a deeper borewell or direct pipeline connectivity to sustain our daily needs.
descriptionTranslated: [Translated from Bengali]: Due to the falling water table, all three handpumps in the village have dried up. We require either a deeper borewell or direct pipeline connectivity to sustain our daily needs.

title: Dry Borewells and Inoperative Handpumps
description: Due to the falling water table, all three handpumps in the village have dried up. We require either a deeper borewell or direct pipeline connectivity to sustain our daily needs.
descriptionTranslated: [Translated from Telugu]: Due to the falling water table, all three handpumps in the village have dried up. We require either a deeper borewell or direct pipeline connectivity to sustain our daily needs.

title: Absent Doctor at Primary Health Center
description: The local Primary Health Center has been without a resident medical officer for three months. It is run by an assistant nurse who cannot handle emergency cases, forcing us to travel 21km.
descriptionTranslated: [Translated from Marathi]: The local Primary Health Center has been without a resident medical officer for three months. It is run by an assistant nurse who cannot handle emergency cases, forcing us to travel 21km.

title: Contaminated Well Water Supply
description: The public well water has turned brown and emits a foul chemical smell. Over 38 villagers, including young children, have fallen sick with stomach infections. We request urgent testing and cleaning.

title: Severe Shortage of Classroom Teachers
description: There are only 2 teachers for 5 grades and 95 students at our government school. The quality of education is declining, and parents are forced to pull their children out.

title: No Computer Lab or Internet Access
description: In this digital era, our high school students have never seen a computer. We request a basic computer lab with 5 systems and a broadband connection to help students learn basic digital literacy.
descriptionTranslated: [Translated from Bengali]: In this digital era, our high school students have never seen a computer. We request a basic computer lab with 5 systems and a broadband connection to help students learn basic digital literacy.

title: Accumulated Solid Waste Garbage Dumps
description: Garbage is being dumped in an open field near the village water source. It has not been cleared for weeks, generating flies, stray dog menace, and water contamination risks.
descriptionTranslated: [Translated from Marathi]: Garbage is being dumped in an open field near the village water source. It has not been cleared for weeks, generating flies, stray dog menace, and water contamination risks.

title: Frequent Unscheduled Power Outages
description: We are suffering from daily unscheduled load shedding of 14 hours. This is severely disrupting the education of our students and makes it impossible to run water pumps for agriculture.
descriptionTranslated: [Translated from Marathi]: We are suffering from daily unscheduled load shedding of 14 hours. This is severely disrupting the education of our students and makes it impossible to run water pumps for agriculture.

title: Broken Culvert Bridge Isolation
description: The concrete pipe culvert over the local stream is severely cracked and near collapse. During monsoons, water flows over it, completely cuting off our village from medical and emergency access.

title: Blocked Open Sewage Gutters Overflowing
description: The open sewers running along the housing blocks are completely blocked with plastic waste. Sewage water is backing up onto the streets and houses, emitting a sickening odor.
descriptionTranslated: [Translated from Telugu]: The open sewers running along the housing blocks are completely blocked with plastic waste. Sewage water is backing up onto the streets and houses, emitting a sickening odor.

title: Muddy Unpaved Village Streets
description: The inner streets of our village are unpaved. During the rainy season, it turns into thick mud, making it impossible for elderly residents to walk or school children to commute safely.
descriptionTranslated: [Translated from Hindi]: The inner streets of our village are unpaved. During the rainy season, it turns into thick mud, making it impossible for elderly residents to walk or school children to commute safely.

title: Defunct and Blocked Community Toilets
description: The public toilet block built two years ago is unusable due to blocked sewer outlets and no water supply. Villagers are forced to resort to open defecation again, posing health risks.
descriptionTranslated: [Translated from Tamil]: The public toilet block built two years ago is unusable due to blocked sewer outlets and no water supply. Villagers are forced to resort to open defecation again, posing health risks.

title: Low Voltage and Fluctuations
description: The electrical voltage in our sector is extremely low. Fluorescent lights barely glow, and home appliances like refrigerators and television sets are frequently burnt out.

title: Hanging High-Tension Cables Hazard
description: An old overhead power transmission line is hanging dangerously low over the rooftops in our street. It poses a life-threatening hazard, especially during windy days and monsoons.

title: Leaking Main Water Pipeline
description: The main pipeline supplying water to the village has broken near the entrance. Thousands of liters of drinking water are being wasted daily, creating a muddy swamp on the main path, while our taps run dry.
descriptionTranslated: [Translated from Hindi]: The main pipeline supplying water to the village has broken near the entrance. Thousands of liters of drinking water are being wasted daily, creating a muddy swamp on the main path, while our taps run dry.

title: Lack of Mosquito Fogging and Insecticides
description: With the stagnant sewage water, dengue and malaria cases are rising. There has been no mosquito fogging or DDT spraying conducted in our village by the local authorities.
